---
title: "JupyterLite - Python in Your Browser"
subtitle: "Full Jupyter Environment Without Installation"
---

# 🚀 JupyterLite - Python in Your Browser

Experience a complete Jupyter environment running entirely in your browser — no installation required!

---

## What is JupyterLite?

JupyterLite is a full-featured Jupyter environment that runs using WebAssembly. It provides:

- ✅ Complete Python runtime (via Pyodide)
- ✅ Jupyter notebooks and console
- ✅ File management
- ✅ Package installation
- ✅ All Python Quest notebooks pre-loaded

**Best part:** Everything runs locally in your browser. No server, no setup!

---

## 🎯 Launch JupyterLite

Click below to open the full Python environment:

[🚀 Launch JupyterLite](jupyterlite/lab/index.html){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

---

## 📚 What's Included

All Python Quest notebooks are available:

- Variables & Data Types
- Control Flow & Loops
- Functions & Modules
- Data Structures
- Algorithms
- Object-Oriented Programming
- And all 19 Python quests!

---

## 💡 Tips for Using JupyterLite

### Getting Started
1. Click the launch button above
2. Navigate to the file browser on the left
3. Open any `.ipynb` notebook
4. Run cells with Shift+Enter

### Installing Packages
```python
import micropip
await micropip.install('package-name')
```

### Saving Your Work
- Files are saved in browser local storage
- Download notebooks to keep them permanently
- Use File → Download to save your work

---

## 🆚 JupyterLite vs Local Jupyter

| Feature | JupyterLite | Local Jupyter |
|---------|-------------|---------------|
| **Installation** | None | Required |
| **Internet** | Initial load only | Not required |
| **Speed** | Good | Better |
| **Packages** | Limited | All packages |
| **Files** | Browser storage | Full file system |
| **Persistence** | Browser-based | Permanent |

---

## ⚠️ Limitations

JupyterLite is powerful but has some limits:

- Not all Python packages available
- Limited to browser storage
- Slower than native Python for heavy computations
- Files stored in browser (not on disk)

For complex projects, consider [local setup →](setup.qmd)

---

## 🔄 Alternative: In-Page Execution

Prefer coding directly on lesson pages?

Each Python quest has executable code cells embedded right in the page. No separate environment needed!

[View Python Quests →](tracks/python/index.qmd)

---

## 📥 Local Development

Want to use Jupyter on your computer?

```bash
# Install Jupyter
pip install jupyter

# Launch
jupyter lab
```

[Full Setup Guide →](setup.qmd)

---

[🚀 Launch JupyterLite Now](jupyterlite/lab/index.html){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg}

[← Back to Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd) | [← Back to Home](index.qmd)
